summary: Parse real saved-data limited skill requirement phrases such as 盟主がLv3以上 and 技能「備急」をLv2.
rootCause: The previous saved-mode limited-skill fix tracked skill levels but only reliably handled tightly-coupled forms such as skillName2 or skillNameLv2. Real candidate text often inserts quotes, particles, 技能, and Lv/レベル wording between the skill name and the required level, so those clauses were still treated as Lv1 and not filtered when the saved star was insufficient.
externalizationDecision: No HTML/CSS change. The fix is in external saved-mode type candidate JavaScript and regression tests.
minimumUserAcceptance: In saved-data mode, verify candidates whose text says 盟主がLv3以上 or 技能「備急」をLv2 are excluded while the saved star only provides Lv1, and appear/score only when the saved star or equipment state provides the required level.
